function.message: I can’t process the next inbox message because mandatory preflight is failing in this sandbox. `preflight_schema` returns no usable roots (inbox/entities/outbox all null) and reports an internal walk/protocol error, so I cannot run `preflight_inbox` or locate/read the inbox safely.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed the required preflight protocol before task work; execution is blocked by preflight tool failure.
function.outcome_justification: The required discovery step (`preflight_schema`) failed twice with: "pcm walk failed: Protocol message TreeRequest has no \"path\" field." With all roots null, the workspace capability needed to access inbox content is unavailable.
